description: For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision.
examples:
Command Example
crowdstrike-search filetype=.docx
Context Example
{
"VX.Search": [],
"File": []
}
name: crowdstrike-search

outputs.description: The SHA-256 hash of the search result. File.SHA1 The SHA-1 of the search result.
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the search result. File.environmentId The environment ID of the search result.
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: The start time of the search result. File.threatscore The threat score of the search result (by server).
outputs.name: File.start_time

outputs.description: The verdict of the search result. File.environmentDescription The environment description of search result.
outputs.name: File.verdict

outputs.description: The submission name of the search result. File.vxfamily The family of the search result.
outputs.name: File.submitname

outputs.description: The threat score of the search result. File.type_short The type of search result, for example: url or host.
outputs.name: File.threatscore

outputs.description: The size of the search result. File.Malicious.Vendor For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: File.size

outputs.description: For malicious files, the reason that the vendor made the decision.
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Description
